location: Guaranteed drop from the Wind-aspected Divine Beast Warrior (the enemy players commonly call a 'Horned Warrior') that patrols the rooftops north of the Cleansing Chamber Anteroom Site of Grace, near the very end of Enir-Ilim — the last stretch before the Needle Knight Leda gauntlet fight. This specific enemy is a one-time encounter and does not respawn.
tactics: Push through Enir-Ilim's rooftop path (past Spiral Rise) toward Cleansing Chamber Anteroom; the Wind-aspected Divine Beast Warrior is found roaming just north of that grace

Two other Divine Beast Warrior variants look identical but drop nothing unique — Lightning-aspected (east of Spiral Rise) and Ice-aspected (on the rooftops between Spiral Rise and Cleansing Chamber Anteroom) — only the Wind one carries this greatsword

These enemies hit extremely hard, have very high poise, and hover in place to channel elemental attacks before unleashing them — bait the slow wind-up, or whittle it down with ranged attacks, sleep arrows, or bleed/status buildup rather than trading blows
The weapon's Ash of War (Horn Calling: Storm) is fixed and cannot be swapped, and the weapon itself cannot be infused with Ashes of War or buffed with spells/consumables
lore: Carried by the horned guardians who watch over Enir-Ilim's tower, this hefty curved blade was forged to put its wielders' blend of raw strength and agility to devastating use. The tangle of horns fused along the blade isn't just ornamental — it doubles as a conduit for the guardians' horn-calling.

builds.name: Strength/Dexterity quality build
builds.why: Even D/D scaling in both Strength and Dexterity with modest requirements (19 STR one-handed, 16 DEX) lets a standard quality build wield it as an alternate curved greatsword with no respeccing needed.

builds.name: Faith hybrid melee build
builds.why: Its D-scaling in Faith (13 required) is unusual for a curved greatsword, letting Faith/incantation-focused characters dip into solid melee damage without diluting their build, backed by the fixed long-range Horn Calling: Storm skill.
